title: Diamond Chest Shops
description: Chest shops for the Diamond Economy mod
body:
Create buy or sell shops in chests or barrels with signs. Click with a command block to make an admin shop.
 

Instructions for creating shops available with /diamonds chestshops


Requires Diamond Economy

To get this working in a goml-ReServed claim, change the getoffmylawn.json to have:
  "allowedBlockInteraction": [
    "minecraft:acacia_wall_sign",
    "minecraft:birch_wall_sign",
    "minecraft:crimson_wall_sign",
    "minecraft:dark_oak_wall_sign",
    "minecraft:jungle_wall_sign",
    "minecraft:oak_wall_sign",
    "minecraft:spruce_wall_sign",
    "minecraft:warped_wall_sign"
  ],
